response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-00:11: Identified as an introductory fight scene. No vocal music. 2. 00:12-05:00: Identified the song 'Magia' by on-screen text and audio recognition. Confirmed original composer as Kajiura Yuki. 3. Used the search tool to find the lyrics for 'Magia'. 4. Segmented the video into an intro (non-vocal) and a main song performance (vocal). 5. Populated the JSON structure with the song metadata and lyrics.
response.global_summary: A video featuring VTubers fighting skeletons in a forest setting, interspersed with a full performance of the song 'Magia'. The video begins with an introductory scene followed by the song performance, an instrumental violin interlude, and a final vocal section.

scenes.description: The video begins with an introductory scene where skeletons are fighting the VTubers. No vocal music is playing.

The song 'Magia' begins, with the VTubers performing in the forest. The lyrics are sung throughout this segment. The song is interrupted by an instrumental violin solo by the green-haired character at 02:49.000, but the vocal performance continues after the fight sequence.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
いつか君が瞳に燈す愛の光が (時を超えて)
滅び急ぐ世界の夢を 確かに一つ (壊すだろう)
躊躇いも飲み幹して 君が望むモノは何?
こんな欲深い憧れの行方に 儚い明日はあるの?
子供の頃夢に見てた 古の魔法のように
暗さえ砕く力で 微笑む君に會いたい
怯えるこの手の中には 手摺られた花の勇気
想いだけが頼る全て 光を呼び覚ます 願い
いつか君も誰かの為に 強い力を (望むのだろう)
愛が胸を捉えた夜に 未知の言葉が (生まれて來る)
迷わずに行けるなら 心が砕けてもいいわ
いつも目の前に悲しみに 立ち向かう為の
呪文が欲しい 君はまだ夢見る記憶
私は眠らない明日 二人が出會う奇蹟を
勝ち取る為に進むわ 怯えるこの手の中には
手摺られた花の刃 想いだけが生きる全て
心に振りがざす 願い
囚われた太陽の輝く 不思議の國の本が好きだった頃
願いはきっと葉うと 教えるお伽噺を
信じた 靜かに咲き亂れていた 古の魔法優しく
世界を変える力が その手にあると囁く
終わらない夢を見よう 君と行く時の中で
想いだけが生きる全て 命を作るのは 願い
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The love light you ignite in your eyes someday (across time)
Will surely shatter the dream of the world rushing toward destruction (one by one)
Swallowing your hesitation, what is it that you desire?
In the path of such deep-seated longing, is there a fleeting tomorrow?
Like the ancient magic I dreamt of as a child
I want to see you smile with the power to shatter even the darkness
In these trembling hands lies the courage of a folded flower
Only my feelings are all I rely on, a wish that awakens the light
Someday you, too, will desire strong power for someone's sake (no doubt)
On the night love captured your heart, unknown words (are born)
If I can go without hesitation, it's alright if my heart breaks
I always want a spell to face the sadness in front of me
You are still a dream-seeing memory, I am a tomorrow that never sleeps
I will move forward to win the miracle of us two meeting
In these trembling hands lies the blade of a folded flower
Only my feelings are all I live for, a wish I brandish in my heart
When I loved the book of Wonderland where the trapped sun shone
I believed in the fairy tale that told me the wish would surely come true
Quietly, the ancient magic was blooming
Whispering that the power to change the world is in your hands
Let's dream an endless dream, in the time I go with you
Only my feelings are all I live for, it is my wish that creates life
